title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. hirtella
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. hirtella, also known as Hairy Eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hairy Eyebright include its ability to soothe and calm the eyes, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and colds. Hairy Eyebright can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in eye drops to treat conjunctivitis and other eye infections.
